getAppActivated() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.Init.InitResponse
Whether the application is activated
Y: Activated
N: Not activated
If value is empty, not support.

getAsyncMode() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ModemParameters
 
getAuthorizationResult() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.AuthorizeCard.AuthorizeResponse
Indicate the transaction result after 1st GAC.
getAuthorizationResult() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.CompleteOnlineEMV.CompleteOnlineEMVResponse
Indicate the below transaction result after 2nd GAC:
0: transaction approved
1: transaction declined
Indicate the below transaction result for partial EMV only.
2: partial EMV approve
3: partial EMV decline
getAuthorizationResult() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.InputAccountResponse
For CONTACTLESS TRANSACTION ONLY: Indicate the transaction result:
0: transaction offline approved
1: transaction offline declined
2: transaction online authorization needed
getAuthType() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.entity.ApnInfo
Authentication type

getVarList(Context, GetVarListRequest, CommSetting) - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.GetVarList
Return a list of variable and value pair, if input is empty return all the non “internal” variable list.
getVarList() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.customFormManage.GetVarListResponse
It uses json format:{"VARNAME1":"VARVALUE1","VARNAME2":"VARVALUE2"}

GoogleSmartTapCap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTap
Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”
GoogleSmartTapCap - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService
Bitmaps for the various capabilities that the ECR supports.
Please see Google Smart Tap Capabilities Bitmap Definition
Default value is “00000000000000000000000000000000”
GoogleSmartTapData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Google Smart Tap specific data.
Only valid when TransType = VASSETMERCHANTPARAMETERS.
Please refer to ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapfor detail

GoogleSmartTapPushServiceData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
F VAS Push Data.
Only valid when TransType = VASPUSHDATA.
Please refer to ManageRequest.GoogleSmartTapPushService for detail.
